body.title: [sprint] AiderDevice — wrap aider as a rack builder (Granny-dispatched, throwaway-clone, branch-not-main, CC-validated)
body.description:
**Problem:** aider is PROVEN a viable builder on our stack (T-aider-builder-first-run + T-aider-multifile-orientation-test: 4/4 GREEN, multi-file orientation held, both models, qwen 2.2x faster, $0 Hex). The remaining step to 'a builder we're happy with' running on the swarm is wrapping it as a rack device that takes a real ticket and produces a validated close — and proving it on a REAL UU ticket against a repo clone (the large-repo + contamination surface the sandboxes did not exercise).

**Proposed shape (subject to Akien's design answers below):** A new devices/aider/ BaseDevice+BaseShim wrapping the aider_smoke invocation logic generalized to (ticket_id, repo_clone) -> aider headless -> result. Granny dispatches role=builder to it (handshake, not spawn — per project_granny_pull_dispatch_and_alarm_model); throwaway clone per ticket (~/dicksimnel pattern, RELATIVE paths — 124553ee contamination lesson); commits to a target BRANCH not main (T-ds-builder-target-branch-not-main); close is CC-VALIDATED (unvalidated builder throughput just shifts the queue to CC — project note). Model = qwen3-coder:30b default (fastest+capable), devstral fallback.

**DESIGN DECISIONS (Akien 2026-07-06 — pre-approval GRANTED for the HIGH-inertia surface; sprint-ready, best FRESH session):**
- Q1 -> SUBPROCESS. aider stays fully external (no imports into unseen_university/), invoked exactly like the proven aider_smoke.py path.
- Q2 -> ONE AiderDevice INSTANCE PER LAPTOP. 4 laptops = 4 builders + CC. Design the device + shim to run 1-2 instances PER BOX, CPU-gated (watch CPU; Akien expects ~2/box is safe). Instance identity per box (project_worker_types / worker-instance-identity).
- Q3 -> BLACK-BOX FIRST. Ship the working builder now; io_corpus capture via the Stage-2 OpenAI-compatible proxy endpoint is a fast-follow, NOT a blocker.
- Q4 -> AUTOMATED GATE + CC SPOT-CHECKS. Close gate = tests-green + diff-scope check (files touched within ticket scope); CC spot-checks a sample, not every close. aider is a known-stable tool, so the gate can be lighter than for DS.

**Revised shape:** devices/aider/ (BaseDevice+BaseShim) wrapping the subprocess aider invocation generalized to (ticket_id, repo_clone) -> aider headless (qwen3-coder:30b@Hex default, devstral fallback) -> automated gate (tests-green + diff-scope) -> result for CC spot-check. Granny handshake-dispatches role=builder; throwaway clone per ticket (relative paths — 124553ee); commits to a target BRANCH not main. Per-box CPU gate caps concurrent instances. Deployment across the 4 laptops = follow-up T-aider-swarm-deployment.

**Affected files:** new devices/aider/ (device.py, shim.py, runner); Granny dispatch (role=builder routing) — HIGH inertia; config profile. Generalizes devlab/claudecode/aider_smoke.py.
**Design rules:** device.py/shim.py design center (BaseDevice/BaseShim); no aider imports into unseen_university/; Granny = handshake not spawn; branch-not-main; no SQLite; log every dispatch/close (interface crossings).
**Scope boundary:** the device + Granny wiring + ONE real-ticket proof run against a repo clone. Proxy-endpoint corpus capture + 3-laptop fleet spin-up are separate follow-ups.
**Completion criteria:**
- AiderDevice accepts a dispatched ticket, runs aider (qwen@Hex) on a throwaway clone, commits to a branch, returns a result for CC validation.
- Proven on >=1 REAL UU ticket end-to-end (real repo clone, not a sandbox) — edits applied, tests green, branch pushed, CC-validated close.
- Granny routes role=builder to it via handshake (no spawn).
**Test plan:** red->green on the device's own logic (dispatch->run->result contract); the real-ticket run is the behavioral proof (a real failing/incomplete ticket -> aider -> green + validated).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.intention: I intend that aider — proven viable — becomes a Granny-dispatched rack builder that produces validated closes on real tickets against real repo clones, giving us a working swarm builder NOW while DS is leveled to match. Serves the aider-builder-first standing intention and the swarm spin-up.
